title: Subitem automations
excerpt:
I’ve added “subitem automations” - is it possible to create an automation where subitems are deleted when subitem status changes to Done (without removing the item or deleting all the subitems)? 
Also I can’t see the WIP…

posts.author: tania_VV (Tania)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve added “subitem automations” - is it possible to create an automation where subitems are deleted when subitem status changes to Done (without removing the item or deleting all the subitems)?

Also I can’t see the WIP board in the drop down menu to use the App. How can I add the WIP board to our folder?

Thanks for your help
